White Abarrio proves too hot to handle for Sovereignty and Journalism in the Oaklawn Handicap... 0:33 5 101 275 21 mil

item.title: 6Dutchgold: Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 3h “Approach to bookmaking” ? Cita At The Races @AtTheRaces · 17h "If I'd have gone to bed
item.description:
Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 3h “Approach to bookmaking” ? Cita At The Races @AtTheRaces · 17h "If I'd have gone to bed the night before and dreamed of a result [it would have been] Mirabad in the first on the Saturday at 50/1!"
Tim Brown heads to @BangorRaces this afternoon and discusses his approach to bookmaking...
#TheInsideLine 1 195

item.title: 6Dutchgold: Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 4h Just back from tullamore . Disappointing result but the atmosphere was brilliant ! Leinst
item.description: Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 4h Just back from tullamore . Disappointing result but the atmosphere was brilliant ! Leinster hurling championship will have plenty more surprises I suspect ! 3 271

item.title:
PatrickKennelly: Patrick Kennelly @PatrickKennelly · 4h Her: “God, he must really not like this place”
Him: “If Albert Einstein was supp
item.description:
Patrick Kennelly @PatrickKennelly · 4h Her: “God, he must really not like this place”
Him: “If Albert Einstein was supposed to be his best 3yo, could this be his worst classic crop in years?” 1 18 1 mil
